insight_events.title: Operating income decelerating
insight_events.summary: Operating income growth moved from +4.9% to +56.6% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
